title: agoseris aurantiaca
intro: Agoseris aurantiaca, also known as Orange Agoseris or Orange Mountain-dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agoseris aurantiaca include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Agoseris aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile plant for various medicinal applications.
